value="<b>course_admin_assignments</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK course_id → courses.id<br/>FK admin_id → users.id<br/>role<br/>permissions (JSONB)<br/>assigned_at, revoked_at (nullable)<br/>UNIQUE(course_id, admin_id)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="520" x="1550" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#c7a63d;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#5b4500;shadow=1;" value="<b>enrollments</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK user_id → users.id<br/>FK course_id → courses.id<br/>status (enrolled, in_progress, completed, dropped)<br/>enrolled_at<br/>completed_at (nullable)<br/>progress_percentage<br/>UNIQUE(user_id, course_id)<br/>created_at, updated_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="520" x="1550" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#c7a63d;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#5b4500;shadow=1;" value="<b>doubts</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK student_id → users.id<br/>FK course_id → courses.id<br/>FK lesson_id → lessons.id (nullable)<br/>title<br/>description<br/>status (open, answered, closed)<br/>FK replied_by → users.id (nullable)<br/>admin_reply<br/>replied_at (nullable)<br/>priority<br/>created_at, updated_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="520" x="1550" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9269bf;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#40245d;shadow=1;" value="<b>lesson_progress</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK enrollment_id → enrollments.id OR (user_id, lesson_id)<br/>FK lesson_id → lessons.id<br/>completed<br/>completed_at<br/>time_spent_sec<br/>last_position_sec<br/>created_at, updated_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="560" x="2220" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9269bf;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#40245d;shadow=1;" value="<b>quiz_attempts</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK user_id → users.id<br/>FK lesson_id OR course_id<br/>score<br/>max_score<br/>passed<br/>time_taken_sec<br/>answers (JSONB)<br/>created_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="560" x="2220" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d28d2c;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#6b3f00;shadow=1;" value="<b>chat_messages</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK user_id → users.id<br/>FK course_id → courses.id (nullable)<br/>FK lesson_id → lessons.id (nullable)<br/>user_message<br/>bot_response<br/>message_type (user, ai, system)<br/>is_helpful<br/>feedback<br/>created_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="560" x="2220" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#f4a261;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#8d4a00;shadow=1;" value="<b>payments</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK user_id → users.id<br/>FK course_id OR enrollment_id<br/>amount<br/>currency<br/>status (pending, paid, refunded)<br/>payment_method<br/>transaction_id<br/>paid_at<br/>created_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="520" x="1550" y="1300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=8;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#f4a261;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#8d4a00;shadow=1;" value="<b>certificates</b><hr/>PK id<br/>FK user_id → users.id<br/>FK course_id → courses.id<br/>certificate_url<br/>issued_at<br/>expiry_date (nullable)<br/>metadata (JSONB)<br/>created_at" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="520" x="1550" y="1600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#9da4af;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#374151;" value="<b>Production Design Notes</b><br/>• Use UUID PKs or BIGSERIAL + indexes<br/>• All tables: created_at, updated_at, deleted_at (soft delete)<br/>• JSONB for flexible data (metadata, preferences, answers)<br/>• Add audit_logs table for compliance<br/>• Indexes on all FKs + frequent filters (email, slug, status)<br/>• Roles are in users.role (no separate tables)<br/>• Ready for sharding / multi-tenancy later" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="520" x="120" y="880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 249, 250), rgb(22, 23, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 115, 232), rgb(79, 156, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 2578px; height: 1px; padding-top: 66px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f2937;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f2937, #c4ccd8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: Production-ready • PostgreSQL style • Soft deletes • Audit-ready • Scalable LMS

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1232px; height: 1px; padding-top: 16px; margin-left: 2681px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Legend
Blue: Identity & Access Management
Green: Course Catalog & Content
Red: Learning Progress & Assessment
Yellow: Operations & Support
Purple: Analytics & AI
Orange: Payments & Certification
Dashed: Optional / Historical FK
All tables have: id (PK, UUID or BIGSERIAL), created_at, updated_at, deleted_at (soft delete)

usersPK id (UUID)
email (UNIQUE)

coursesPK id (UUID)
title
slug (UNIQUE)
FK category_id → course_categories.id

metadata (JSONB)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(157, 164, 175), rgb(91, 97, 106));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 502px; height: 1px; padding-top: 951px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #374151;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#374151, #aeb7c5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Production Design Notes
• Use UUID PKs or BIGSERIAL + indexes
• All tables: created_at, updated_at, deleted_at (soft delete)
• JSONB for flexible data (metadata, preferences, answers)
• Add audit_logs table for compliance
• Indexes on all FKs + frequent filters (email, slug, status)
• Roles are in users.role (no separate tables)
• Ready for sharding / multi-tenancy later
